case_title: IRENE CHE ET AL VS. SEAN WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-14-2018 CONTINUED TO MAY-16-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-26-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61560373) (TRANSACTION ID # 61560373) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHE, IRENE ALSO FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEIGH, ALEX JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 HOURS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-26-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-16-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 61952498)
